+++
title = "Local Groups Advocate for Increased Community Energy Initiatives"
date = "2026-03-05"
author = "Sarah Jenkins, Chief Reporter"
categories = ["Community"]
tags = ["Hastings","Rye","Energy Projects","Renewable Resources"]
draft = false
+++

Several community groups in Hastings and Rye have rallied behind a campaign to promote greater use of renewable energy sources at the local level. The initiative, which aims to 'unlock community energy at scale', seeks to empower residents by facilitating easier access to renewable technologies such as solar panels and wind turbines.

Supporters argue that these efforts will not only reduce carbon emissions but also foster economic growth through job creation in the green sector. Local activists believe that widespread adoption of sustainable practices can help address climate change while simultaneously lowering energy costs for households and businesses.

The campaign is gaining traction among community leaders who are looking to harness grassroots support to push forward with innovative solutions tailored specifically to Hastings and Rye's unique circumstances.

---
**Source:** [Original Article](https://news.google.?oc=5)
